requirements.statement: The system must reduce the average time a seller waits before a buyer question is answered to less than 30 seconds for property-related questions by automating responses via the AI chatbot.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Average response time for property-related questions is less than 30 seconds
requirements.source_text: Reduce the average time a seller waits before a buyer question is answered from >2 hours to <30 seconds

requirements.statement: The system must support English, Hindi, and Hinglish so that at least 85% of Clinqup's target user base can interact with the bot in their preferred language.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: At least 85% of target user base can interact with the bot in their preferred language
requirements.source_text: Support English, Hindi, and Hinglish so that ≥85 % of Clinqup's target user base can interact with the bot in their preferred language

requirements.statement: The system must increase the share of chat conversations that result in a site visit or inquiry form submission by 15% compared to the pre-chatbot baseline.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Share of chat conversations resulting in site visit or inquiry form submission increases by 15% compared to pre-chatbot baseline
requirements.source_text: Increase the share of chat conversations that result in a site visit or inquiry form submission by 15 % compared to the pre-chatbot baseline

requirements.statement: The system must allow newly listed properties with zero real buyer messages to display realistic sample conversations.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Newly listed properties with zero real buyer messages display realistic sample conversations
requirements.source_text: Allow newly listed properties with zero real buyer messages to display realistic sample conversations

requirements.statement: The system must achieve zero-downtime deployments with a fully automated test + build + push pipeline that runs on every merge to main and blocks bad releases via automated tests.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: System achieves zero-downtime deployments with fully automated test + build + push pipeline
requirements.source_text: Achieve zero-downtime deployments with a fully automated test + build + push pipeline that runs on every merge to main and blocks bad releases via automated tests
